isEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = UPPER(#v_pRootBoardID#) AND access_ = 1 AND write_fg = 'TRUE' AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'EVERYONE') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid BoardID, A.boardname BoardName, A.boardname2 BoardName2, A.treevieworder TreeViewOrder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN (SELECT boardid, accessid, access_, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND access_ = 1 AND boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'EVERYONE') ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC

select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.boardid, A.boardname, A.boardname2, A.treevieworder, A.boardcolor BoardColor, A.c_clubno C_ClubNo, A.gubun FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A WHERE RTRIM(parentboardid) = #v_pRootBoardID# AND A.boardid <> #v_pExcludeBoardID# AND RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_pClubNo# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.treevieworder ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT no, title FROM TBL_C_BOARD WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY writeday DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE title LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%' OR content LIKE '%' ||#v_KEYWORD#|| '%' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE title LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%'||#v_KEYWORD#||'%' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: ORDER BY no DESC
ORDER BY no DESC

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: ORDER BY ref DESC, step ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT title, step, re_level, ref, charfilename, readnum, writeday, username, username2, id, no FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE no = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT title, step, re_level, ref, charfilename, readnum, writeday, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$, id, no FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE no = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE no = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#

SELECT * FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE no = TO_NUMBER(#v_NO#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#
SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_CLUBNAME# AND c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A# AND c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B# AND c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUB.c_regdate, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname2, c_clubgubun, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_cate_c, c_clubconfirmtype, c_sysopid, c_membercnt, c_logo, c_clubdesc, c_clubbanner, companyid, isin, T1.itemcnt FROM TBL_C_CLUB CROSS JOIN ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) ITEMCNT FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid = TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT A.c_clubgubun, A.c_clubconfirmtype, B.permit FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_C_CLUBUSER B ON A.c_clubno = B.c_clubno JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.c_clubno = C.c_clubno WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.boardid BoardID, B.boardname BOARDNAME, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.attachments, A.readcount, A.itemlevel, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE userid = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.boardid = P.boardid AND A.tenant_id = P.tenant_id AND P.gubun <> 3 WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND A.enddate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT userid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.boardid = A.boardid AND S.itemid = A.itemid AND S.userid = #v_pUserID# AND S.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) ) ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.upperitemidtree, A.startdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.boardid AS BOARDID, B.boardname AS BOARDNAME, A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername, A.writerdeptname, A.writercompanyname, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.attachments, A.readcount, A.itemlevel, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE userid = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.boardid = P.boardid AND A.tenant_id = P.tenant_id AND P.gubun <> 3 WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND A.enddate > #v_pNow# AND (NOT EXISTS(SELECT userid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.boardid = A.boardid AND S.itemid = A.itemid AND S.userid = #v_pUserID# ) ) AND ROWNUM >= #v_pEndRow# ORDER BY #v_pSortBy#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.writerdeptname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.writercompanyname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.startdate, A.writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE userid = #v_PUSERID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY itemid ) D ON A.itemid = D.ITEMID WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND startdate < #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(A.upperitemidtree) DESC, A.startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername$v_strLang$, A.writerdeptname$v_strLang$, A.writercompanyname$v_strLang$, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.totalcount END READFLAG FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS TOTALCOUNT, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND startdate <= #v_pNow#
AND title LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND writername$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND abstract LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND startdate > #v_pStartDate#
AND enddate > #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(A.upperitemidtree) DESC, A.startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.boardid, B.boardname$v_strLang$, A.writerid, A.writername$v_strLang$, A.writerdeptname$v_strLang$, A.writercompanyname$v_strLang$, A.parentwritedate, A.writedate, A.startdate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE D.totalcount END readflag FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname$v_strLang$, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid LIKE #v_pBoardID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE A.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND enddate > #v_pNow#
AND title LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND writername$v_strLang$ LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND abstract LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND startdate > #v_pStartDate#
AND enddate > #v_pEndDate#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(A.upperitemidtree) DESC, A.startdate ASC ) WHERE rownum <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT itemid, writerid, writername, writername2, writerdeptname, writerdeptname2, writercompanyname, writercompanyname2, writedate, parentwritedate, importance, title, contentlocation, startdate, enddate, abstract, attachments, upperitemidtree, itemlevel, copieditem, extensionattribute1, extensionattribute2, extensionattribute3, extensionattribute32, extensionattribute4, extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE itemid = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate = #v_pParentWriteDate# AND upperitemidtree LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) DESC, startdate ASC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) DESC, startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND itemid <> #v_pItemID# AND upperitemidtree NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND itemid <> #v_previousItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) DESC, startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_pParentWriteDate# AND itemid <> #v_pItemID# AND upperitemidtree NOT LIKE #v_pUpperItemIDTree# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) DESC, startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.startdate, A.enddate, A.title, A.attachments, A.importance, B.boardid, B.boardname$v_strLang$, A.abstract FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT boardid, boardname$v_strLang$, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.writerid = #v_pUserID# AND A.startdate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC
ORDER BY #v_pSortBy# DESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pEndRow#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT userid, username, username2, userdeptname, userdeptname2, usercompanyname, usercompanyname2, usertitle, usertitle2, readdate+(#offset# /(60*24)) AS readdate FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND itemid = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY readdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 50

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit <> 0 AND B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE '%' || #v_SER# || '%' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT A.c_id, A.companyid, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_id) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND permit <> 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT c_name, c_cate_a CATE, NVL(COUNT(c_code), 0) CNT FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_a = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = TBL_USERMASTER.cn AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_a = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = #cat# AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY c_name, c_cate_a
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_name, c_cate_b CATE, NVL(COUNT(c_code), 0) CNT FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_b = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = TBL_USERMASTER.cn AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_b = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = #cat# AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY c_name, c_cate_b

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, c_membercnt, description, description2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_a = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_a = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, c_membercnt, description, description2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_C_CATEGORY ON TBL_C_CLUB.c_cate_b = TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_code AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = TBL_C_CATEGORY.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_cate_b = #code# AND TBL_C_CATEGORY.c_cat = LOWER(#cat#) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, c_clubconfirmtype, description, description2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.c_clubno) AS ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND T1.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_pStart# AND #v_pEnd#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) AS COPCNT FROM (SELECT C_CLUBNO, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt, c_logo_thumbnail, c_clubdesc, displayname, displayname2, description, description2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY T1.c_clubno) AS ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB T1 JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(T1. c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# WHERE $v_searchName$ LIKE '%' || #v_searchValue# || '%' AND T1.tenant_id = #tenantID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.c_clubgubun, A.c_clubconfirmtype , B.permit FROM TBL_C_CLUB A JOIN TBL_C_CLUBUSER B ON A.c_clubno = B.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO C ON A.c_clubno = C.c_clubno AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND RTRIM(B.c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.itemid, A.writerid, A.writername$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.writerdeptname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.writercompanyname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, A.startdate, A.writedate, A.parentwritedate, A.importance, A.title, A.readcount, A.attachments, A.itemlevel, A.abstract, CASE WHEN D.totalcount IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END READFLAG, A.extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(userid), 0) AS totalcount, itemid, tenant_id FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_PUSERID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY itemid, tenant_id ) D ON A.itemid = D.itemid AND A.tenant_id = D.tenant_id WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY A.parentwritedate DESC, A.startdate DESC, A.docno DESC, TO_CHAR(A.upperitemidtree) DESC
ORDER BY #v_PSORTBY#
) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PENDROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT itemid, title FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT c_id, permit FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_STRNO# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, isin FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_PCLUBID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.permit, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_visited, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubname2, TBL_C_CLUB.c_membercnt, TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubgubun, TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubconfirmtype, TBL_C_CLUB.c_logo_thumbnail FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_visited DESC

SELECT no, title FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY ref DESC,step ASC
ORDER BY ref DESC,step ASC
ORDER BY ref DESC,step ASC
ORDER BY no DESC
SELECT boardid, boardname, boardname2, showposition, sn, gubun FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# AND showposition != ' ' ORDER BY sn, showposition

SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid, itemid, title, writedate, gubun, extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid = TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id WHERE TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# ORDER BY parentwritedate DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) DESC, startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE itemid = #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY pollgroupno DESC
SELECT questionid FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(managerid) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_POLLMANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLMANAGER WHERE RTRIM(managerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE RTRIM(pollmanagerid) = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_POLLRESPONSE WHERE questionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND answeretc IS NOT NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubgubun, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_sysopid, isin, companyid, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, isin, companyid FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_code# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT filepath FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE itemid = #v_pOrgItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, boardname, boardname2, itemid, gubun, writerid, writername, writername2, writerdeptname, writedate, title, itemcnt, c_membercnt, c_clubname, c_clubname2, a.boardid FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id CROSS JOIN (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) itemcnt FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_copNo# AND A.parentboardid != 'TOP' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_membercnt FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_copNo# AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T3 WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_copNo# AND A.parentboardid != 'TOP' AND B.startdate <= #v_pNow# AND B.enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY B.writedate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM (SELECT (SUBSTR(c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, 1, 18)) AS c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, c_clubno, c_clubgubun, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_membercnt, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_membercnt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <=3

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$, c_clubno, c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_membercnt, c_clubconfirmtype FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE (c_regdate >= (TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -30)) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_clubno DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <=3
SELECT c_sysopid, isin FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_sysopid, companyid FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT B.email, B.username FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER A JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND TRIM(A.c_id) = B.userid AND A.companyid = B.companyid WHERE TRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.permit != 0 AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_cat = #cat# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY c_code, c_order
SELECT answerid FROM TBL_C_POLLANSWER WHERE pollquestionid = #v_QUESTIONID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT RTRIM(c_sysopid) FROM (SELECT c_sysopid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_membercnt, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_clubconfirmtype, displayname, displayname2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB JOIN TBL_USERMASTER T2 ON RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUB.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(T2.cn) AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = T2.tenant_id WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_clubname2, c_clubdesc, c_logo_thumbnail, c_membercnt, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_clubconfirmtype, ' ' displayname, ' ' displayname2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ = #num#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(accessid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDMANAGE WHERE boardadmin_fg = 'TRUE' AND ( accessid = #v_pUserID# OR accessid = #v_pDeptID# OR accessid = #v_pCompanyID# OR accessid = 'everyone' ) AND boardid = ( SELECT boardgroupid FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT result FROM TBL_COMM_TREECACHE WHERE query = #v_pRootBoardID# ||','|| #v_pUserID# ||','|| #v_pDeptID# ||','|| #v_pCompanyID# ||','|| #v_pMode# ||','|| #v_pSubFlag# ||','|| #v_pSelectBy# ||','|| #v_pExcludeBoardID# ||','|| #v_pClubNo# ||','|| #v_strLang# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_clubboardtitle ONEVALUE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_clubboard2title ONEVALUE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubpdstitle ONEVALUE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_STRCLUBNO# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(MAX($v_MAXIDFIELDNAME$),0) FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#

SELECT filename FROM $v_BNAME$ WHERE $v_MAXIDFIELDNAME$ = #v_STRMAXNUM# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE#
SELECT companyid FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO WHERE companyid = #v_USERINFO_COMPANYID# AND userid = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(MAX(clubid), 0) FROM TBL_CLUBID WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_id) = #v_PUSERID#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_PCLUBNO#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = RTRIM((SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#))
AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubgubun = '2'
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_PCLUBNO#
AND RTRIM(c_clubno) = (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#)
AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_lastdate FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND RTRIM(c_id) = #v_USERINFO_USERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.itemid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT boardid FROM TBL_COMM_MYBOARDS WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) B ON A.boardid = B.boardid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON P.boardid = B.boardid AND P.gubun <> 3 AND P.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT userid FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM_READ WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND readdate > (TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') -5)) AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) ) AND A.startdate < #v_pNow# AND A.startdate > #v_pFromNow# AND A.enddate > #v_pNow#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(itemid), 0) TotalCount FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND startdate < #v_pNow# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.itemid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO P ON A.boardid = P.boardid AND A.tenant_id = P.tenant_id WHERE A.boardid = #v_pBoardID# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND startdate <= #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND title LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND writername LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND abstract LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND startdate > #v_pStartDate#
AND enddate > #v_pEndDate#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.itemid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM A WHERE A.boardid LIKE #v_pBoardID# AND enddate > #v_pNow# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND title LIKE '%' ||#v_pTitle#|| '%'
AND writername LIKE '%' ||#v_pWriterName#|| '%'
AND abstract LIKE '%' ||#v_pAbstract#|| '%'
AND startdate > #v_pStartDate#
AND enddate > #v_pEndDate#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(itemid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE writerid = #v_pUserID# AND startdate > #v_pNow# AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_COMM_ONELINEREPLY WHERE itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND replyid = #v_REPLYID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT c_name FROM TBL_C_CATEGORY WHERE c_code = #v_C_CODE# AND c_cat = #v_C_CAT# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT c_clubno FROM (SELECT T1.c_clubno, writedate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY writedate DESC) ROWNUM_ FROM (SELECT DISTINCT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, MAX(writedate) WRITEDATE FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno ) T1 ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ BETWEEN #v_PSTART# AND #v_PEND#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT T1.c_clubno FROM (SELECT TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno, TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_visited DESC ) ROWNUM_ FROM TBL_C_CLUBUSER JOIN TBL_C_CLUB ON TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_clubno = TBL_C_CLUB.c_clubno AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = TBL_C_CLUB.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(TBL_C_CLUBUSER.c_id) = #v_USERID# AND TBL_C_CLUB.c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND permit <> 0 AND TBL_C_CLUBUSER.tenant_id = #tenantID# ) T1 JOIN TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO ON TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.c_clubno = T1.c_clubno AND TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id = T1.tenant_id JOIN TBL_COMM_ITEM ON TBL_COMM_ITEM.boardid = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.boardid AND TBL_COMM_ITEM.tenant_id = TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO.tenant_id GROUP BY T1.c_clubno, TBL_COMM_ITEM.writedate

SELECT c_type FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(itemid), 0) FROM TBL_COMM_ITEM WHERE upperitemidtree LIKE #v_pItemID# AND itemid <> #v_pItemID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT versionuse FROM TBL_COMM_BOARDINFO WHERE boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT questionid FROM TBL_C_POLLQUESTION WHERE pollmanagerid = #v_MANAGERID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
